page_content:
Formerly: LATN203.

LATN269 Special Topics in Study Abroad II (1-6 Credits)

Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

LATN301 Plautus (3 Credits) Plautine drama. Literary, linguistic and socio-cultural aspects. Readings are in Latin.

LATN302 Ovid (3 Credits) Major works of Ovidian poetry. Literary and moral atmosphere of Augustan age. Readings are in Latin.
